calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Contreras/R Ross, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Stephen Leong, is present.
Attorney, George M. Lee, is appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants, Linda Allen and Steve Gabara, are present.
Ruth Hawley, is present representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of 11-03-08 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
